goal: replace 2D/JSON-only wand placeholder with original-style rod/cap component architecture and custom item renderer
fixed_now: WandItemRenderer custom renderer using original TC4 rod/cap model textures
Wand item models now builtin/entity instead of item/generated/handheld/layered placeholders
why_this_matches_original_intent: TC4 wand is not a single flat sprite; it is assembled from rod and caps.
Rod/cap are now first-class data types instead of only texture layers.
The model source of truth is now a custom renderer, not a normal generated item model.
Original TC4 model textures are used from the extracted original asset bank.
remaining: Renderer is architecturally correct for 1.19.2 but still not exact TC4 OpenGL render math.
Need exact TC4 vis cost modifiers across all rods/caps.
Need wand crafting table GUI parity.
